/home/kws/ggml-hexagon/prebuilts/android-ndk-r28/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android35 --sysroot=/home/kws/ggml-hexagon/prebuilts/android-ndk-r28/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security -march=armv8.7-a -O3 -DNDEBUG  -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments   -Wl,--gc-sections  CMakeFiles/test-c.dir/test-c.c.o -o ../bin/test-c  ../bin/libllama.so ../bin/libggml.so ../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../bin/libggml-hexagon.so ../bin/libggml-base.so ../../../prebuilts/android-ndk-r28/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/lib/clang/19/lib/linux/aarch64/libomp.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/kws/ggml-hexagon/prebuilts/Hexagon_SDK/6.2.0.1/ipc/fastrpc/remote/ship/android_aarch64 -latomic -lm
